ul.li: Fragmentation: Zero internal fragmentation; 56-byte packed structure.
Cache Locality: Struct fits entirely within a single 64-byte L1 cache line.
Padding: 8 bytes of slack space (0x38-0x3F) before next cache line.
Critical Path: free_list_head and allocated are modified on every alloc/free.

g.title: Pointer to the start of the contiguous memory region
Size of each individual memory block in bytes
Total number of blocks available in the pool
Number of blocks currently in use
Pointer to the first available free block
Bitmap for tracking block status (1=In Use, 0=Free)
Size of the allocated_map in 64-bit words
